query: What is Elon Musk's current net worth according to Bloomberg Billionaires Index in early July 2026? Has it recovered above $1 trillion after the late June 2026 tech selloff? Include recent Tesla and SpaceX share price and valuation trajectory.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**Elon Musk's net worth in early July 2026: ~$995 billion (Bloomberg) / ~$960 billion (Forbes) — below $1 trillion. He has NOT recovered above the trillion-dollar mark after the late-June 2026 selloff.**

Key findings:
- **Trillionaire, then not:** Musk became the world's first trillionaire on June 12, 2026 via the record-breaking SpaceX IPO (~$1.1T), peaked at an all-time high of ~$1.45T on June 16, then lost the title within two weeks when the late-June selloff (starting ~June 22) erased ~$350B and dropped SpaceX >31% from its peak.
- **July 7 selloff resumed the decline:** SpaceX fell ~7% to $149.47 (below its $150 IPO debut) and Tesla dropped ~4% to $402.90, costing Musk another ~$50B and keeping him firmly under $1 trillion heading into July 8.
- **Tesla (TSLA):** $402.90, ~$1.51T market cap, ~19% below its 52-wk high; Musk owns ~20%.
- **SpaceX (SPCX):** $149.47, ~$1.97T market cap, ~34% below its June 16 peak and near its 52-wk low; Musk owns ~42% (4.8B shares + 350M options).

Musk still ranks #1 globally by a wide margin (Larry Page distant 2nd at ~$296B). Note that Bloomberg's figure updates at each NY market close, and Forbes/Bloomberg differ by tens of billions due to differing SpaceX/xAI valuation methodologies. Full structured data with all sources and data points has been recorded.

sources.title: Wealth of Elon Musk
sources.snippet: Elon Musk is the wealthiest person in the world, with an estimated net worth of US$995 billion according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index and $960 billion according to Forbes, as of July 2026. His net worth reached as high as $1.4 trillion but dropped to under $1 trillion several times.

sources.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Drops $50 Billion In Latest SpaceX Selloff
sources.snippet: Musk's net worth dropped more than $50 billion Tuesday as SpaceX shares tumbled nearly 7% to below their $150 debut price, while Tesla shares dropped more than 4%. Musk holds 4.8 billion SpaceX shares and another 350 million stock options.

sources.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Drops $350 Billion In Massive SpaceX Selloff—But He's Still A Trillionaire
sources.snippet: SpaceX plunged 16.4% Monday to under $155. Stock sunk more than 31% since its June 16 peak of $225.64, dropping Musk's net worth from an all-time high of $1.45 trillion to just under.

sources.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as tech rout hammers Tesla, SpaceX
sources.snippet: Musk remains the world's richest person by a wide margin, with Larry Page a distant second at $296B.
